name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: The Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra features a 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, 200MP camera system, and 5000mAh battery with 45W fast charging. Comes with S Pen included.

name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro
description: Apple iPhone 15 Pro features a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion, A17 Pro chip, 48MP main camera, titanium design, and USB-C connectivity.

name: OnePlus 12
description: OnePlus 12 sports a 6.82-inch 2K AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, Hasselblad triple camera, and 100W SUPERVOOC charging.

name: Xiaomi 14
description: Xiaomi 14 features Leica optics with a 50MP triple camera system, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 4610mAh battery with 90W wired charging, and a compact 6.36-inch display.

name: Realme GT 5 Pro
description: Realme GT 5 Pro offers Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 6.78-inch AMOLED display, 144Hz, 50MP triple camera, and 100W fast charging in a premium glass body.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5
description: Industry-leading noise canceling wireless headphones with up to 30 hours battery life, multipoint connection, speak-to-chat technology, and premium sound quality.

name: JBL Flip 6
description: Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker with bold JBL Original Pro Sound, IP67 rating, 12 hours playtime, and PartyBoost feature to link multiple speakers.

name: Boat Airdopes 141
description: True wireless earbuds with 42-hour playtime, BEAST Mode for low latency gaming, IPX4 water resistance, and environmental noise cancellation.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: MacBook Air with M2 chip delivers up to 18 hours battery life, fanless design, Liquid Retina display, and MagSafe charging in an ultra-thin aluminum enclosure.

name: Dell XPS 15
description: Dell XPS 15 features a 15.6-inch OLED display, 13th Gen Intel Core i7, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060, 32GB RAM, and precision-crafted aluminum body.

name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon
description: Ultra-light business laptop with 14-inch display, Intel Core i7, up to 15 hours battery life, MIL-SPEC durability, and premium keyboard experience.

name: ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14
description: Gaming laptop with AMD Ryzen 9 6900HS, Radeon RX 6700S, 14-inch QHD 120Hz display, 76Wh battery, and innovative AniMe Matrix LED display.

name: HP Pavilion x360
description: 2-in-1 convertible laptop with 14-inch FHD touchscreen, Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and 360-degree hinge for versatile use modes.

name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9
description: Premium Android tablet with 11-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2, IP68 rating, S Pen included, and DeX desktop experience.

name: iPad Air M2
description: iPad Air with M2 chip features a 11-inch Liquid Retina display, 12MP rear camera, USB-C, Magic Keyboard compatibility, and all-day battery.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 8K DPI sensor, MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel, quiet clicks, USB-C charging, and multi-device connectivity.

name: Keychron K2 Pro
description: Compact 75% wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches, RGB backlighting, Mac and Windows layout, and Bluetooth 5.1 connectivity.

name: LG C3 OLED 55-inch
description: 55-inch OLED evo television with 4K resolution, 120Hz refresh rate, α9 AI Processor Gen6, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, and gaming features including G-Sync.

name: Sony Bravia XR A95L
description: OLED 4K TV with XR Cognitive Processor, Triluminos Pro display, 120Hz, HDMI 2.1, and exclusive Bravia sound system.

name: Godrej Edge Pro Refrigerator
description: 507L frost-free double door refrigerator with inverter compressor, Freshield technology, 6-in-1 convertible freezer, and 10-year compressor warranty.

name: Whirlpool 1.5-ton Split AC
description: 5-star rated 1.5-ton split air conditioner with inverter technology, 6th sense active cool technology, auto restart, self-cleaning, and 10-year compressor warranty.

name: Philips Air Purifier AC2887
description: HEPA air purifier covering 400 sq ft, removes 99.97% particles, real-time feedback display, 3-speed settings, and auto mode for intelligent purification.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1
description: 7-in-1 electric pressure cooker combines pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté, yogurt maker, and food warmer in one appliance.

name: Dyson V15 Detect
description: Cordless vacuum cleaner with laser dust detection, 60-minute runtime, HEPA filtration, and intelligent suction adjustment based on dust levels.

name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Men's lifestyle shoe featuring Max Air heel unit, breathable mesh upper, foam midsole, and rubber outsole for all-day comfort and style.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: Running shoe with Linear Energy Push midsole, Primeknit upper, Continental rubber outsole, and responsive BOOST midsole cushioning.

name: Levi's 501 Original Jeans
description: Classic straight fit jeans in rigid denim, button fly, 5-pocket styling, and the original blue jeans since 1873. Available in multiple washes.

name: Raymond Slim Fit Suit
description: Premium slim fit suit in super 110s wool blend, half-canvassed construction, 2-button single breasted jacket, and flat-front trousers.

name: Titan Raga Watch
description: Women's fashion watch with 34mm rose gold-tone stainless steel case, mother-of-pearl dial, sapphire crystal glass, and leather strap.

name: Noise ColorFit Pro 4
description: Smartwatch with 1.72-inch TFT display, 100+ sports modes, SpO2 monitoring, Bluetooth calling, 7-day battery life, and IP68 water resistance.
